preToolUse.name: safety-gate
preToolUse.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$payload = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($payload -match 'git reset --hard|Remove-Item\s+-Recurse\s+-Force|del\s+/f\s+/s\s+/q') { [Console]::Error.WriteLine('Blocked destructive tool invocation by local-minion safety gate.'); exit 1 }"

postToolUse.name: basic-log
postToolUse.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$payload = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $logPath = Join-Path (Get-Location) '.github/minions/hook.log'; $entry = [ordered]@{ timestamp = (Get-Date).ToString('o'); event = 'postToolUse'; payload = $payload }; ($entry | ConvertTo-Json -Compress) | Add-Content -Path $logPath"
